_comment: Registry of relations that were MOVED or RETIRED during the 2026 DB transition. The clean-cut doctrine: the old name no longer exists, so every stale reference MUST error. check-dead-relations.ts scans the codebase for references to the OLD name and lights the terminal RED until they are gone. Add an entry the moment you move/retire a table — BEFORE repointing — so the guard drives the repoint. Mirror of platform.deprecated_relations in the DB.

relations.reason: moved to workbench schema (clean cut, no shim). Use .schema('workbench').from('notes').
moved to workbench schema (clean cut, no shim). Use .schema('workbench').from('note_folders').
